title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Puravankara - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Puravankara - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Puravankara has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Puravankara:
Puravankara is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara!
